headline: Custody Bank Stocks Q1 Earnings Review: Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN) Shines
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN) and the best and worst performers in the custody bank industry.
